title: Kholisa Sonjica, hat-trick hero
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local side Oriented...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local side Oriented Birds FC, only in their second season in the semi-professional division, are keeping their hopes alive of ending the 2024/25 season in the top four spots on the log.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local side Oriented Birds FC, only in their second season in the semi-professional division, are keeping their hopes alive of ending the 2024/25 season in the top four spots on the log."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On Saturday afternoon, 12 April, Oriented Birds defeated Salim United 3-0 in a thrilling Safa Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League at Kwanokuthula Stadium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kholisa \"Ntsebe\" Sonjica netted the three goals for Oriented Birds.","html":"Kholisa \"Ntsebe\" Sonjica netted the three goals for Oriented Birds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dropping crucial points","html":"Dropping crucial points"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 32 points, the Birds are fighting for the top four positions in the stream B log table, after dropping crucial points in the second leg of the provincial league.","html":"With 32 points, the Birds are fighting for the top four positions in the stream B log table, after dropping crucial points in the second leg of the provincial league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With two games remaining, the Birds have played 19 games with nine victories, three draws and seven defeats.","html":"With two games remaining, the Birds have played 19 games with nine victories, three draws and seven defeats."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Salim United, from the Overberg region, are currently second last at the bottom of the table in stream B.","html":"Salim United, from the Overberg region, are currently second last at the bottom of the table in stream B."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fighting as a team","html":"Fighting as a team"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The home side started the game at a high tempo, encouraged by their supporter base.","html":"The home side started the game at a high tempo, encouraged by their supporter base."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Salim United tried their best to defend against the offensive play from Oriented Birds flanks. The Yellow Marines boys (Oriented Birds) fought as team from the onset of the game.","html":"Salim United tried their best to defend against the offensive play from Oriented Birds flanks. The Yellow Marines boys (Oriented Birds) fought as team from the onset of the game."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The experienced forward Kholisa Sonjica scored his brace in the first 45 minutes, putting his team in the lead. The first half ended 2-0 with the Overberg Region team trailing into the break."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Great touches","html":"Great touches"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second half saw both teams looking very sharp, with the home team making the best of their ball skills.","html":"The second half saw both teams looking very sharp, with the home team making the best of their ball skills."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Salim United were working overtime blocking Oriented Birds' wingers. Sonjica extended their lead to 3-0, beating the Salim United goalkeeper with a powerful shot.","html":"Salim United were working overtime blocking Oriented Birds' wingers. Sonjica extended their lead to 3-0, beating the Salim United goalkeeper with a powerful shot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds kept on pressing, rolling the ball on the ground and trying to get more chances into the box, but failed to convert their further opportunities.","html":"The Birds kept on pressing, rolling the ball on the ground and trying to get more chances into the box, but failed to convert their further opportunities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After the game","html":"After the game"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kholisa Sonjica of Oriented Birds told the Knysna-Plett Herald that it was great to score three goals and he was very happy about it.","html":"Kholisa Sonjica of Oriented Birds told the Knysna-Plett Herald that it was great to score three goals and he was very happy about it."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, he said, it wouldn't have been possible without the support from his teammates and the management of the team.","html":"However, he said, it wouldn't have been possible without the support from his teammates and the management of the team."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He said the previous week has been very hard for him after he lost his aunt, Nomawabo Buqa, who was a big fan."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He has dedicated his goals to her. He said the 2024/25 season has been interesting. They have faced many challenges along the way, but as a team they remained positive and hungry for more.","html":"He has dedicated his goals to her. He said the 2024/25 season has been interesting. They have faced many challenges along the way, but as a team they remained positive and hungry for more."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"ABC Motsepe weekend results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stream A","html":"Stream A"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Friday 11 April","html":"Friday 11 April"},{"type":"list","items":["Grassy Park United 3-2 Young Bafana","Crystal Palace 0-1 City Kings"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday 12 April","html":"Saturday 12 April"},{"type":"list","items":["Hout Bay United 1-2 Zizwe United","FN Rangers 3-2 Diaz Leeds","Cape Town Spurs 0-2 Vasco da Gama","Junction Rovers 1-2 Ubuntu Football"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stream B","html":"Stream B"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Friday 11 April","html":"Friday 11 April"},{"type":"list","items":["Maties 4-1 Ammar Soccer Academy","Seaside Spurs 2-1 Barcelona","Hanover Park vs Ubuntu Spartans (Ubuntu didn't honour their fixture)"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday 12 April","html":"Saturday 12 April"},{"type":"list","items":["Oriented Birds 3-0 Salim United","Mbekweni Cosmos 1-2 Royal Blues","Santos 7-0 Infantry School"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
